crime.quote: they found Danny, Max's ex-boyfriend trying to kidnap Hayden

victim.value: Hayden, a young child who is Max's little cousin
victim.quote: Danny grabbed Hayden and jumped out the window "Hayden!" Max screamed

closed_world.value: Halloween night in a residential neighborhood during trick-or-treating
closed_world.quote: group of friends on Halloween who were trick-or-treating

culprit_and_motive.value: Danny, Max's ex-boyfriend; motive unclear but appears to target Max through her cousin
culprit_and_motive.quote: they found Danny, Max's ex-boyfriend trying to kidnap Hayden

investigator.value: Max and her friends, with police involvement mentioned
investigator.quote: the police are here and they need to ask you some questions

suspect_architecture.value: Single identified suspect: Danny (ex-boyfriend) with clear motive (past relationship with Max) and opportunity (access to house)
suspect_architecture.quote: they found Danny, Max's ex-boyfriend trying to kidnap Hayden

red_herring.value: Initial focus on mysterious alley feeling and unknown house intruder before revealing known ex-boyfriend as perpetrator
red_herring.quote: Max gets the weirdest feeling so she stops

social_world.value: Teenage friend group hierarchy with protective dynamics around younger children and emerging romantic relationships
social_world.quote: You like Alex!' Jenna said smiling

reveal_mechanic.value: Direct discovery through confrontation - characters walk in and catch perpetrator in the act of kidnapping
reveal_mechanic.quote: when they opened the door they found Danny, Max's ex-boyfriend trying to kidnap Hayden

media_and_audience.value: Police involvement represents institutional response, but no broader media or public perception explored
media_and_audience.quote: the police are here and they need to ask you some questions

investigator_wound.value: Max's vulnerability through past relationship with Danny (the perpetrator) creating personal stakes in the crime
